text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...So please, help us!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For all the trouble I've caused you so far, I will apologize as many
times as it takes! But I need your cooperation to make the Cheer
Squad a success!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Sure thing. The records of last year's performance should be
over here somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I know it's a lot to ask after her recent behavior, but King is—wait,
whaaat?! Are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Huh? 'Course. It's rule fifty-six of the disciplinary committee! "When
asked for help, act immediately"!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, i-it's just, you seemed really angry with King this whole time...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's because her actions were disturbing peace and order at the
time. But right now, you're looking for help with the Cheer Squad,
right?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So I have to help you! Simple as that!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: King and Nature
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's get right into it. King, what do you think is the most
important thing when it comes to cheering at the Fan Fest?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Um, I think it's... joining together to support the competitors who are
working hard in their events.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah, well that is important, but there's one more thing that's essential!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Keep in mind that you're the Cheer Squad for the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We put on the Fan Fest to show our appreciation to the fans who
always support us.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So the main goal of every event is to make sure our fans are having
fun!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Same goes for the Cheer Squad!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The Cheer Squad's role is to have fun with the fans as you cheer
together! It's not just about hyping up the competitors, but the fans
too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We want cheering to be fun for them! That's how the Cheer Squad
shows gratitude to the fans!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
In our world, there's usually a clear line between the ones cheering
and the ones being cheered on.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But at the Fan Fest, the Cheer Squad and the fans join together as
members of the same group!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The fans are also members of our group...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, everyone! Cheer loud, cheer proud, and have some fun! I grant
you all the right to match my enthusiasm!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, I can't. Look, they're not excited at all! As the leader, I have to
take charge and get everyone fired up!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...I think I might have been too controlling. Rather than stand side by
side with them, I tried to pull them along behind me.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Then that's something to bear in mind next time! You have the second
practice session next week, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
King. As cheer captain, your job is to make the Fan Fest a fun time for
everyone there.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Your voice reverberated across the whole campus during practice.
You're going to make the real Fan Fest just as memorable, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Yes!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you want us to make cue cards for the cheers? I think everyone in
the squad has them memorized already, though...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I know, but we're not the only ones in the Cheer Squad. I want all the
fans to be able to sing along too. So please!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that makes sense! We've only told them by word of mouth up till
now. I'll get to it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I also want the fans to have a chance to give us feedback
before the real event, so I'm thinking of holding an informal meeting.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: Since it's informal, should we prepare some drinks and stuff?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Good idea! I'll get right to arrang... Um...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, could I ask you to arrange the drinks? You'd be doing me a
great favor.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: Ah! Sure! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's not so tense anymore, and her communication has
improved. Nature, what kind of magic have you worked on her?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What? Oh, stop it. I can't do magic or anything special like that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It was King's idea. She decided to lean on us more, even for the little
things. So that we can all cheer with a smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soon enough, it's the day of the second practice cheer session.

text_block_list.name: Fans and Cheer Squad
text_block_list.text: Go, go, let's go! Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I can't wait for the big day to come around! We were all in sync
today!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I've got the cheers down now too! I'm ready to shout out loud
for our Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(The cheers this practice session were much more in sync than the
first. Everyone looked cheerful too, like they were more confident it'd
go well.)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (And our cheer captain next to me was laughing happily too.)
